SEARCH

Chemical Plant Digital Twin API 1.0

Packages
Package
Description
cpdt.backend
Implements the backend module of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin.
cpdt.backend.config
Provides Spring configuration classes for the backend module.
cpdt.backend.controllers
Provides REST controllers for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.entities
Defines the persistent entities used by the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.exception
Defines exception types and global exception handling for the backend.
cpdt.backend.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.repositories
Defines the data access layer for the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.services
Implements the business logic of the Digital Twin backend.
cpdt.backend.twin
Provides components for maintaining the Digital Twin state.
cpdt.common.dto
Provides the Data Transfer Objects (DTOs) used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.enums
Provides the enumerated types used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.models
Provides the core domain models used throughout the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.common.utils
Provides utility classes shared across the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator
Provides the simulation layer of the Chemical Plant Digital Twin (CPDT) platform.
cpdt.simulator.bootstrap
 
cpdt.simulator.devices
Contains implementations of simulated devices, including sensors and future actuators.
cpdt.simulator.engine
Provides the core simulation engine responsible for executing the chemical plant simulation.
cpdt.simulator.environment
Provides the environmental model used by the chemical plant simulator.
cpdt.simulator.mqtt
Provides MQTT communication components for publishing simulated telemetry to external systems and vice versa.
cpdt.simulator.scenarios
Provides simulation scenarios that introduce predefined operating conditions and events into the chemical plant simulation.
